calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chris Dewys for Bobbie Campbell.

Mr. Dewys stated that there are two bank accounts ($70,000.00 and $20,000.00), and that one was taken out of the Trust at the request of Bank of America and transferred to the Decedent as an individual account in order to use the power of attorney. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Dec-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
